---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)

account_id <- Sys.getenv("STEAM_32ACCOUNT_ID")
```



```{r}
library(httr2)

base_url <- paste0("https://api.deadlock-api.com/v1/players/", 
              account_id, 
              "/match-history")

response <- request(base_url) |>
  req_url_query("force_refetch" = "true") |>
  req_perform()

resp_body_string(response)

response |> 
  httr2::resp_body_string() |>
  jsonlite::fromJSON() |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  write_parquet("matches.parquet")

response |> 
  httr2::resp_body_string() |>
  jsonlite::fromJSON() |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  filter(game_mode == 4) |> 
  select(-account_id, -game_mode) -> matches_df
  

response2 <- request("https://api.deadlock-api.com/v1/assets/heroes") |>
  req_perform()

response2 |> 
    httr2::resp_body_string() |>
  jsonlite::fromJSON() |> 
  as_tibble() 
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)
library(treemapify)
library(ggimage)
library(grid)
library(magick)


heroes_df <- response2 |>
  resp_body_string() |>
  fromJSON(flatten = TRUE) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  select(
    hero_id = id, 
    image_url_regular = images.icon_hero_card,
    image_url_critical = images.hero_card_critical,
    image_url_gloat = images.hero_card_gloat,
    name_image_url = images.name_image,
    bg_image_url = images.background_image
  )

# 2. Process your match data (Assuming your tibble is named 'matches_df')
hero_stats <- matches_df |>
  group_by(hero_id) |>
  summarise(
    picks = n(),
    wins = mean(match_result) |> round(3) * 100, 
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  left_join(heroes_df, by = "hero_id") |>
  filter(!is.na(image_url_regular)) |>
  mutate(
    # Dynamic portrait assignment based on WR conditions
    portrait_url = case_when(
      wins <= 45 ~ image_url_critical,
      wins >= 55 ~ image_url_gloat,
      TRUE ~ image_url_regular
    )
  ) 

top_hero_bg_url <- hero_stats |> 
  arrange(desc(picks)) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  pull(bg_image_url)

# Read the image from the URL to build a full-bleed raster
global_bg_image <- image_read(top_hero_bg_url)
global_bg_grob <- rasterGrob(global_bg_image, width = unit(1, "npc"), height = unit(1, "npc"), interpolate = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# 3. Generate Coordinates & Sizes
tree_data <- treemapify(hero_stats, area = "picks") |>
  mutate(
    x_scale_factor = xmax - xmin,
    y_scale_factor = ymax - ymin,
    x_center = (xmin + xmax) / 2,
    y_center = (ymin + ymax) / 2,
    
    name_size = pmin(y_scale_factor * 0.45, x_scale_factor * 0.65),
    name_y = ymax - (y_scale_factor * 0.20),
    stats_y = ymin + (y_scale_factor * 0.15)
  )

# PRE-RENDER TILE BACKGROUNDS: Create a stretched background image for each tile
tile_bgs <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(tree_data)), function(i) {
  row <- tree_data[i, ]
  tryCatch({
    img <- image_read(row$bg_image_url)
    grob <- rasterGrob(img, width = unit(1, "npc"), height = unit(1, "npc"), interpolate = TRUE)
    annotation_custom(grob, xmin = row$xmin, xmax = row$xmax, ymin = row$ymin, ymax = row$ymax)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
})
tile_bgs <- tile_bgs[!sapply(tile_bgs, is.null)]

# 4. Build the Final Plot
p <- ggplot(tree_data, aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax)) +
  
  # Base layer: Full-screen ambient background
  annotation_custom(global_bg_grob, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1)

# Inject the tile-specific background images
for (bg_layer in tile_bgs) {
  p <- p + bg_layer
}

# Add standard layers on top
p <- p +
  # Colored tile backdrop over the tile backgrounds
  geom_rect(aes(fill = wins), color = "black", linewidth = 1.0, alpha = 0.80) +
  
  # Hero Portrait: Uses dynamic conditional URLs, scaled vertically
  geom_image(aes(x = x_center, y = y_center, image = portrait_url, size = y_scale_factor * 0.9), by = "height") +
  
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#3A0202", mid = "#5C4A00", high = "#033010", 
    midpoint = 50, name = "Win Rate (%)",
    guide = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 25, barheight = 1, title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  
  geom_image(aes(x = x_center, y = name_y, image = name_image_url, size = name_size)) +
  scale_size_identity() + 
  
  # Drop shadow layer
  geom_text(
    aes(x = x_center + 0.002, y = stats_y - 0.003, label = sprintf("%d | WR: %.1f%%", picks, wins)),
    color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 4.5, family = "sans" 
  ) +
  
  # Main text layer
  geom_text(
    aes(x = x_center, y = stats_y, label = sprintf("%d | WR: %.1f%%", picks, wins)),
    color = "#F5F5DC", fontface = "bold", size = 4.5, family = "sans" 
  ) +
  
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#050505", color = NA),
    
    # ALIGNMENT FIX: Force title and subtitle to align to the edge of the full canvas
    plot.title.position = "plot", 
    plot.title = element_text(color = "#D4AF37", face = "bold", size = 24, hjust = 0, margin = margin(t = 15, b = 5)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "darkgrey", face = "italic", size = 13, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 20)),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 25, 20, 25),
    
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.title = element_text(color = "#D4AF37", face = "bold", size = 11, margin = margin(b = 5)),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "darkgrey", size = 9)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Not So Random Random Street Brawl",
    subtitle = "Based on my 693 games"
  )

ggsave("random_SB7.png", width = 16, height = 9)
```
